title: equisetum ramosissimum f. subverticillata
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum f. subverticillata, also known as Chinese horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chinese horsetail include the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to improve bone health and reduce the risk of osteoporosis. Chinese horsetail can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
